mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id, goods_id, user_id, price, quantity, total_amount, status, pay_timeout, close_time, create_time, update_time FROM seckill_order WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO seckill_order (order_id, goods_id, user_id, price, quantity, total_amount, status, pay_timeout, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{goodsId}, #{userId}, #{price}, #{quantity}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{payTimeout}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE seckill_order SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = 0
UPDATE seckill_order SET status = #{status}, close_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id, goods_id, user_id, price, quantity, total_amount, status, pay_timeout, create_time, update_time FROM seckill_order WHERE status = 0 AND pay_timeout < NOW() LIMIT 1000
